title: Specd Data Port
description: `@specd/ui` must never import `@specd/core`. `SpecdDataPort` is the single aggregated interface the IDE uses for project, change, workspace spec, graph, and remote log data, implemented by HTTP remote, in-memory fakes, or desktop IPC.
context: `@specd/ui` must never import `@specd/core`. `SpecdDataPort` is the single aggregated interface the IDE uses for project, change, workspace spec, graph, and remote log data, implemented by HTTP remote, in-memory fakes, or desktop IPC.

rules.requirement: SpecdDataPort aggregates all port method groups
rules:
The interface MUST compose `port-project`, `port-changes-collection`, `port-changes-read`, `port-changes-mutate`, `port-workspaces-specs`, `port-graph`, `port-archived-changes`, and `port-studio-panel`.

The `port-studio-panel` contribution is limited to remote log readback and debug trace writes. User-visible Output/Problems session buffers are local UI state and MUST NOT be modeled as remote `SpecdDataPort` methods.

rules.requirement: multiple adapters implement the same port interface
rules: Production implementations include `adapter-remote-specd-data`, `adapter-memory-specd-data`, and desktop IPC local; they MUST expose identical method signatures.

constraints: @specd/ui and @specd/client MUST NOT import @specd/core or @specd/sdk for kernel bootstrap.
HTTP handlers MUST NOT import @specd/core from @specd/ui or @specd/client.
v1 server auth: api.auth.type from specd.yaml (never studio.*); registry registers only disabled; no server-side Bearer enforcement on loopback or specd ui serve.
Artifact save/load MUST use core:save-change-artifact and core:get-change-artifact — not raw ChangeRepository.saveArtifact from HTTP handlers.
There is no GET /changes/{name}/validation resource; use GET .../status and POST .../validate.
Canonical workspace spec artifacts are read-only in Studio v1.

scenarios.requirement: SpecdDataPort aggregates all port method groups
scenarios.name: Port composes project collection read mutate groups
then: interface includes project, changes, workspaces, graph, archived methods
AND consumers depend on aggregate only

scenarios.requirement: SpecdDataPort aggregates all port method groups
scenarios.name: Output session buffer is not exposed as a remote port method
when: SpecdDataPort is inspected after the output-locality change
then: no dedicated remote output-buffer contract is required
AND bottom-panel output/problems remain local UI state

scenarios.requirement: SpecdDataPort aggregates all port method groups
scenarios.name: Graph methods delegate to port-graph
then: underlying port-graph HTTP or IPC runs
AND UI does not call code-graph directly

scenarios.requirement: SpecdDataPort aggregates all port method groups
scenarios.name: Breaking port change fails compile
then: adapters and UI fail TypeScript build
AND contract drift is caught early

scenarios.requirement: multiple adapters implement the same port interface
scenarios.name: Remote and memory adapters are interchangeable
given: fixture data seeded in memory adapter
when: same UI hook runs against both adapters

scenarios.requirement: multiple adapters implement the same port interface
scenarios.name: Desktop local uses IPC implementation
then: AND no HTTP to localhost required

scenarios.requirement: multiple adapters implement the same port interface
scenarios.name: Adapter selection is profile-driven
when: user switches from local to remote profile
